name: PageVisit
description: First-party page-visit log. One row per unique visitor per day (deduped client-side). Distinct visitor_id per visit_date = Unique Daily Visitors.

visitor_id.description: Anonymous per-browser UUID stored in localStorage (no PII, no login).

visit_date.description: Date of the visit in YYYY-MM-DD.

rls._comment: IMPORTANT: this page is viewed logged-out, so anonymous visitors must be allowed to CREATE rows. In the base44 entity's permissions/RLS, set: create = public (anyone). Keep read restricted to admins/owners so the raw log isn't public. If base44 will not allow anonymous create, expose a public backend function (e.g. logPageVisit) that writes with a service role and call that from logFirstPartyVisit() instead.
